taskDescription: Build the missing layers of BCOS's context base: cross-zone retrieval surface, sub-agent isolation for big-body work, wiki-zone stub repair, and task-driven cross-zone routing. Wiki is one zone among several. Plan must work for empty and populated repos. Mechanical-first principle (D-10): LLM is opt-in escalation only, never auto-fires. Foundation reuses the canonical context_index.py / context-index.json shipped on 2026-05-04 (commit 871ff4d).

planStatusHistory.event: Plan artifacts created; presenting full plan for Gate 2 approval

User audit flagged six blockers: status drift across files, schema-violating task IDs (P0_*a / PE_*), D-10 LLM auto-trigger contradiction in P1_005, missing acknowledgement of context_index.py canonical model, weak TDD ordering, sparse per-task verification

Pre-implementation cleanup pass: phases renumbered P1–P7 (was P0–P5+99); IDs schema-compliant; status synced; D-10 enforced (--semantic opt-in only); context_index.py acknowledged as P1/P2 foundation; TDD ordering applied (fixture + failing test first per phase); per-task verification added

P1 (Zone Registry) shipped: fixtures, drift test, context-zones.md, _context-zones.yml.tmpl, load_zone_registry.py, system-design + wiki-zone cross-links. 8/8 zone-registry tests pass; 16 wiki + 4 context-index tests still green; integration audit clean.

P2 (Cross-Zone Read Foundation) shipped: 5-doc fixture corpus, test_context_search.py (15 assertions), context_search.py (BM25 over context-index.json, --semantic opt-in only, slug-stable citation-ids), context-routing skill (SKILL.md + search.md), /wiki search sugar wired into bcos-wiki dispatch, wiki-zone.md RAG section rewritten as 'shipped today' with future RAG below, context-zones.md gains search entry-point. 15/15 search tests + 8/8 zone-registry + 16/16 wiki + 4/4 context-index + 16 frontmatter + 0 reference errors + integration audit clean. Ecosystem state refreshed (15 skills now).

P4 (Wiki Stub Repair) shipped: _wiki_yaml.py consolidated parser+emitter (refresh_wiki_index migrated; 6/6 parser tests), _wiki_http.py HEAD/ETag (6/6 tests), schema 1.0->1.1 migration recipe (real, reversible round-trip 3/3 tests), _wiki_lint.py Jaccard duplication detection per user choice (4/4 tests), schema template gains etag/last-modified/content-hash for source-summary, docs deltas in wiki-zone.md, lint.md Step K, migration-helpers.md. 20/20 stub-repair tests green; all prior regressions green.

P3 (Sub-Agent Isolation) shipped: wiki-fetch agent (input/output contract, 4000-token cap), wiring across run/refresh/promote/create with explicit anti-inline-fetch rule, _wiki_fetch_contract.py validator (canonical/error/malformed/oversized), _wiki_budget.py cumulative dispatch decider (parallel/serial per 80% rule), wiki-zone.md Operational Discipline section, ecosystem state refreshed (15 skills, 2 agents). 15/15 P3 tests + 20/20 P4 + all prior regressions green.

P5 (Task-Driven Cross-Zone Routing) shipped — the architectural one. _context.task-profiles.yml.tmpl with 9 profiles + per-repo override loader; validate_task_profiles.py; context_bundle.py resolver (mechanical pattern-matching, BFS edge walk, source-of-truth ranking, freshness verdicts, conflict detection on overlapping EXCLUSIVELY_OWNS across zones, coverage gaps, unsatisfied-zone-requirements); skill surface (context-routing/bundle.md + bcos-wiki/bundle.md); context-routing.md framework doc. D-10 strict: --resolve-conflicts and --verify-coverage are explicit opt-in only, both raise LLMEscalationNotImplementedError without --dry-run. 20/20 P5 tests + 119 prior regressions all green.

P7 (FIXED END) closed: doc-lint clean (frontmatter 17/17, references 0 errors, task-profiles 9/9), integration audit clean (no coverage gaps), ecosystem state refreshed (15 skills, 2 agents, 2 utilities, HEALTHY), 6 institutional learnings captured (L-017..L-022). All 7 phases shipped: P1 zone registry (8/8), P2 cross-zone search (9/9), P3 sub-agent isolation (9/9), P4 wiki stub repair (9/9), P5 task-driven routing (12/12), P6 embeddings deferred (conditional, not triggered), P7 fixed-end (5/5). 130 tests across 7 suites green. Ready for public PR.

userApproval.userComment: Approved conceptually at Gate 2; cleanup pass before implementation per audit verdict.
conditions: Renumber phases to P1–P7 with schema-compliant task IDs
Sync status across README, implementation-plan, plan-manifest
Drop LLM auto-trigger in P2_006; --semantic flag is the only escalation path
Reframe P1/P2 to build on context_index.py / context-index.json
Reorder each phase: fixture + failing test BEFORE implementation tasks
Every task carries a verification block

reuseCandidates: context_index.py: provides zone classification (_zone_for), trust levels, freshness, edges — P1 wraps it declaratively, P2 reads its JSON output
context-index.json: already-built corpus with frontmatter+edges — P2 search reads from it (no re-walk)
build_document_index.py: consumer pattern for context_index.py — P2 search follows same shape
explore agent: sub-agent prior art for wiki-fetch shape (P3)
AskUserQuestion: P4_009 lint-impl-or-remove decision; P5_009 conflict resolution UX
wiki-zone-integration plan precedent: durable-vs-runtime split, per-task verification convention
gapsIdentified: No /context bundle for task-driven routing (P5 fills)
No sub-agent isolation for fetches (P3 fills)
No HEAD/ETag/Last-Modified impl despite wiki-zone.md claim (P4 fills)
wiki_schema.py migrate is a stub (P4 fills) — verified failing: 'No executable migration recipe'
duplication-vs-data-point lint described but not implemented (P4 resolves: impl or remove)
Three hand-rolled YAML parsers — no consolidation (P4 fills via _wiki_yaml.py)
No declarative zone registry to mirror context_index.py semantics (P1 fills)

preFlightDecisions.default: Both /wiki search and /context search, shared backend
Mechanical-first; LLM-on-escalation ONLY via explicit opt-in flags. No auto-trigger paths.

requiredCapabilities.name: bcos-wiki
requiredCapabilities.reason: Extended with /wiki search and /wiki bundle subcommands; refresh/run/promote/create wired through wiki-fetch.

requiredCapabilities.name: context-routing
requiredCapabilities.reason: NEW skill for cross-zone /context search and /context bundle.

requiredCapabilities.name: wiki-fetch
requiredCapabilities.reason: NEW sub-agent for big-body fetch isolation (URL, PDF, .docx).

tasks.content: Create test fixtures: sample frontmatter set covering every zone (active, framework, wiki, planned, archive, inbox, collection-*) for zone-registry validation
tasks.note: Mechanical: pure fixture data; TDD seed before implementation.

tasks.content: Write failing test: test_zone_registry.py asserts _context-zones.yml.tmpl loads, declares every zone context_index.py recognizes, and freshness-field/required-fields agree with context_index.py per zone
tasks.note: TDD: this test must fail until P1_004 ships the YAML; documents the contract first.

tasks.content: Author docs/_bcos-framework/architecture/context-zones.md as the human-readable zone registry: one section per zone declared by context_index.py (path-glob, purpose, frontmatter shape, freshness field, source-of-truth role, addressing, optional flag)
tasks.note: Mechanical: pure documentation; companion to context_index.py (not a parallel definition).

tasks.content: Create docs/_bcos-framework/templates/_context-zones.yml.tmpl as the machine-readable companion. Schema: {zones: [{id, path-glob, frontmatter-fields-required, freshness-field, freshness-model, source-of-truth-role, addressing, optional}]}. Zone IDs must match context_index.py outputs.
tasks.note: Mechanical: declarative companion. Downstream code reads THIS plus context_index.py; the test asserts they agree.

tasks.content: Per-repo override loader (.claude/scripts/load_zone_registry.py): docs/.context-zones.yml if present, else framework template; expose load_zone_registry() returning the zones list

verification.command: python -c "from load_zone_registry import load_zone_registry; assert load_zone_registry()" 2>/dev/null || (cd .claude/scripts && python -c "from load_zone_registry import load_zone_registry; assert load_zone_registry()")

tasks.content: Drift test in test_zone_registry.py: assert every zone returned by context_index.py._zone_for() on fixtures appears in the YAML, and vice versa. Should now pass green.
tasks.note: TDD red→green transition; P1 acceptance gate.

tasks.content: Update docs/_bcos-framework/architecture/system-design.md: add cross-zone retrieval section linking to context-zones.md and context_index.py canonical model
Update docs/_bcos-framework/architecture/wiki-zone.md: cross-link to context-zones.md as the canonical zone registry (wiki is one zone among many)
Create test fixtures: small corpus across 3 zones (active, wiki, planned) with known title/tag/cluster signals for ranking validation

Write failing test: test_context_search.py asserts ranked hits with shared schema {slug, zone, page-type, cluster, summary, builds-on, freshness-days, score, citation-id}; --zone filter; top-K cap; token budget; 0-hit empty repo case
tasks.note: TDD: must fail until P2_003 ships.

tasks.content: Build .claude/scripts/context_search.py: reads .claude/quality/context-index.json as corpus (no re-walk); BM25-style ranking (term frequency × inverse document frequency × recency boost × zone-priority from _context-zones.yml); top-K + token-budget; --zone filter; deterministic.
tasks.note: Mechanical: BM25 over context-index.json. Reuses canonical model; no parallel walking.

tasks.content: Stable slug-based citation-id generator (e.g., wiki:linkedin-tone#h2-tone-rules, plans:wiki-missing-layers#section-4); test stability across whitespace edits
Create .claude/skills/context-routing/SKILL.md (NEW skill, trigger /context) and search.md subcommand invoking context_search.py with --zone, --top-k, --token-budget flags

LLM escalation path: --semantic flag ONLY (D-10 strict). User explicitly passes --semantic; LLM reformulates the query into 3 candidates; each runs mechanically; results merge. NO auto-trigger on 0-hit. Hard caps: 2000 tokens / 5s latency / 1 LLM call per invocation.
tasks.note: LLM (opt-in only): explicit flag is the ONLY escalation path. D-10 strict; no auto-trigger paths.

tasks.content: Add /wiki search zone-scoped sugar: .claude/skills/bcos-wiki/search.md invokes context_search.py --zone wiki; update bcos-wiki/SKILL.md dispatch table

Drive P2_002 to green; extend test_wiki_capability.py with cross-zone cases; verify token budget, citation stability, --zone filter, 0-hit empty-repo path, --semantic opt-in flag (no auto-trigger assertion)
tasks.note: TDD red→green transition; P2 acceptance gate.

tasks.content: Documentation deltas: rewrite wiki-zone.md RAG-readiness section with concrete reality; add search entry-point to context-zones.md; update bcos-wiki/SKILL.md dispatch
Create test fixtures: mock URL with synthetic 100k-token body; mock PDF/.docx extraction inputs; expected sub-agent result schema
Write failing test: contract-shape test for wiki-fetch result schema (≤4000 tokens regardless of input); isolation assertion (run.md uses Task tool, not direct fetch); cumulative-budget guard test
tasks.note: TDD: must fail until P3_003+ ship.

tasks.content: Create .claude/agents/wiki-fetch/AGENT.md: input {url|file-path, kind: web|github|youtube|pdf|docx|local, extraction-mode: shallow|deep}; output {title, h2-outline, key-sentences, suggested-page-type, suggested-cluster, raw-file-pointer, citation-banner-fields, error?}; hard cap 4000 result tokens
tasks.note: Mechanical agent shape; LLM lives INSIDE the sub-agent only.

tasks.content: Wire wiki-fetch into bcos-wiki/run.md Pass 1: one sub-agent invocation per URL in queue; main thread receives only structured summary, never full body
Wire wiki-fetch into wiki-source-refresh full-tier (refresh.md): when page past stale_threshold_days, dispatch sub-agent for refresh-must-rediscover; main thread compares delta
Wire wiki-fetch (kind: pdf|docx) into promote.md and create.md Path B: binary stays at _wiki/raw/local/<slug>.<ext>; structured extract returns to main
Cumulative token budget guard in run.md: across N parallel sub-agent invocations, sum projected result tokens; if > 80% of main-context limit, queue subsequent sub-agents serially
Drive P3_002 to green; assert sub-agent result schema; assert main context never holds full body; cumulative-guard fires on synthetic 10-URL batch
tasks.note: TDD red→green transition; P3 acceptance gate.

tasks.content: Document sub-agent pattern in wiki-zone.md "Operational Discipline" section: when to use a sub-agent (work-tokens >> result-tokens), shape returned, why isolation matters
Create test fixtures: sample source-summary page, mock HEAD response (etag/last-modified/content-length), pre/post migration page bodies, YAML edge cases (multi-line scalars, anchors, special chars)
Write failing tests: HEAD/ETag round-trip, schema migration 1.0↔1.1 round-trip (reversible), Jaccard lint detection (or removal verification gate), YAML parser equivalence across edge cases
tasks.note: TDD: must fail until P4_003+ ship.

tasks.content: Consolidate three hand-rolled YAML parsers into .claude/scripts/_wiki_yaml.py (single parser, supports multi-line scalars, anchors, simple types). Replace usage in post_edit_frontmatter_check.py, refresh_wiki_index.py, wiki_schema.py.

verification.command: python -c "from _wiki_yaml import parse_frontmatter" 2>/dev/null || (cd .claude/scripts && python -c "from _wiki_yaml import parse_frontmatter")

tasks.note: Mechanical: pure parser. Parser-equivalence test must pass on existing fixtures.

tasks.content: Implement HEAD/ETag/Last-Modified for wiki-source-refresh quick-check tier (.claude/scripts/_wiki_http.py): head_check(url) → {etag, last-modified, status, content-length}; quick-check tier compares against stored values, bumps last-fetched if unchanged

verification.command: python -c "from _wiki_http import head_check" 2>/dev/null || (cd .claude/scripts && python -c "from _wiki_http import head_check")

tasks.content: Source-summary frontmatter additions: etag, last-modified, content-hash. Update _wiki.schema.yml.tmpl page-type definition for source-summary.
tasks.activeForm: Adding HTTP fields to source-summary schema

tasks.content: Schema migration recipe 1.0→1.1 (real, reversible, parametric): adds etag/last-modified/content-hash to source-summary pages. Use as reference impl; document recipe-registration pattern in migration-helpers.md.
tasks.note: Mechanical: parametric Python. Replaces 'No executable migration recipe' stub.

tasks.content: duplication-vs-data-point lint: implement Jaccard threshold check (similarity > 0.6 over ≥3 consecutive sentences) OR remove the lint ID cleanly from registry + docs. Decision via AskUserQuestion before merge.
tasks.note: Mechanical: Jaccard math; user decides impl vs remove via AskUserQuestion.

tasks.content: Drive P4_002 to green: HEAD round-trip, migration round-trip (1.0↔1.1), lint detection or removal verification, parser equivalence
tasks.note: TDD red→green transition; P4 acceptance gate.

Write failing test: test_context_capability.py asserts bundle resolution per profile, conflict detection on disagreeing structured fields, freshness verdict (fresh|stale|past-threshold), coverage-gap detection, deterministic output (run twice = byte-identical bundle modulo generated-at)
tasks.note: TDD: must fail until P5_003+ ship.

tasks.content: Task-profile schema in docs/_bcos-framework/templates/_context.task-profiles.yml.tmpl: {id, description, required-zones, source-of-truth-ranking, freshness-thresholds, traversal-hints, coverage-assertions} per profile

Built-in profile catalog: market-report:write, engagement:plan, architecture:design, competitor:audit, customer:onboard, decision:log, incident:postmortem, skill:author, plan:revise. Each declares zones, source-of-truth ranking per D-03, freshness, coverage assertions per D-05 patterns.
Per-repo override loader (.claude/scripts/load_task_profiles.py): docs/.context.task-profiles.yml if present, else framework template

verification.command: python -c "from load_task_profiles import load_task_profiles" 2>/dev/null || (cd .claude/scripts && python -c "from load_task_profiles import load_task_profiles")

tasks.content: Profile validator (.claude/scripts/validate_task_profiles.py): schema conformance, declared zones exist in _context-zones.yml, content-family patterns valid. Wired into doc-lint (P7).

Bundle resolver (.claude/scripts/context_bundle.py): load profile, query context_search.py per family, apply source-of-truth ranking deterministically, walk typed edges per traversal-hints (depth cap), compute freshness verdict, detect mechanical conflicts (structured-field disagreement), compute coverage gaps. Returns structured bundle.
tasks.note: Mechanical (default): declarative rules + graph walk over typed edges in context-index.json.

tasks.content: Bundle output schema: {profile-id, generated-at, by-zone, by-family, freshness, source-of-truth-conflicts, missing-perspectives, traversal-hops, unsatisfied-zone-requirements, escalations}

verification.command: python .claude/scripts/context_bundle.py --profile market-report:write --json | python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert all(k in d for k in ['profile-id','by-zone','by-family','freshness','unsatisfied-zone-requirements'])"

tasks.content: LLM escalation paths (D-10 strict opt-in only): --resolve-conflicts (LLM resolves unresolved conflicts; cap 5 calls/bundle, ~8k input each); --verify-coverage (LLM verifies prose-perspective coverage; cap 1 call/bundle, ~6k input). Both OFF by default; never auto-trigger.
tasks.activeForm: Wiring opt-in LLM escalation in bundle
tasks.note: LLM (opt-in only): D-10 strict; flags are the ONLY escalation paths. Hard caps: 6 calls / ~50k tokens / ~30s latency total per bundle.

tasks.content: Skill surface: .claude/skills/context-routing/bundle.md invokes context_bundle.py; .claude/skills/bcos-wiki/bundle.md adds /wiki bundle <profile> zone-scoped sugar. Update dispatch tables.
Drive P5_002 to green: bundle resolution per profile, conflict detection, freshness, coverage gap, deterministic output. Empty-repo path returns unsatisfied-zone-requirements without crash.
tasks.note: TDD red→green transition; P5 acceptance gate.

tasks.content: Documentation: NEW docs/_bcos-framework/architecture/context-routing.md (or merge into content-routing.md). Documents profile shape, ranking semantics, freshness model, traversal rules, escalation rules.

tasks.content: doc-lint: JSON structure validation on profile YAMLs, schema YAMLs, plan-manifest.json
doc-lint: Markdown quality check on revised docs (wiki-zone.md, context-zones.md, context-routing.md, system-design.md)
ecosystem-manager: Integration audit (analyze_integration.py --ci) + AI review of cross-references between new SKILL.md, AGENT.md, scripts, hooks, settings
ecosystem-manager: Refresh ecosystem state.json to reflect context-routing skill + wiki-fetch agent
ecosystem-manager: Capture learnings (mechanical-first design choice, sub-agent contract pattern, profile-schema vocabulary, TDD ordering pattern, plan-manifest schema-compliance discipline)

phases: P1 — Zone Registry (foundational; declarative companion to context_index.py)
P2 — Cross-Zone Read Foundation (mechanical search over context-index.json)
P3 — Sub-Agent Isolation for Big-Body Work
P4 — Wiki Stub Repair (HEAD/ETag, migration, Jaccard, YAML consolidation)
P5 — Task-Driven Cross-Zone Routing (the architectural one)
P7 — FIXED END (doc-lint + integration audit + ecosystem state refresh + learnings capture)
plan.fixedStart: Discovery + ecosystem overlap + canonical-model audit (complete during planning + cleanup pass)
plan.fixedEnd: Phase P7: doc-lint + integration audit + ecosystem state refresh + learnings capture (mandatory per AGENTING template)
plan.tddOrdering: Each implementation phase opens with: (1) fixture creation, (2) failing regression test, then (3+) implementation tasks, then a (final) red→green driver task. Documentation deltas come last in each phase.
